flaggedZones.instruction: Add participial connectors and occasional compound joins across the patrol-road exchange so the short dialogue and beat chain stop landing as isolated units.
In the southern-stones banter, combine adjacent short lines with action-linked clauses and ', Ving' bridges instead of letting each beat stand alone.
Around the 'Choose / Measuring' exchange, fold reaction beats into the surrounding sentences and use one compound clause to break the clipped Q-and-A chain.
Across the north-patrol handoff, add connective participial phrasing and a few joined clauses so the transition carries through-line momentum instead of sentence-by-sentence drops.
Link Lor'themar's warning and Sylvanas's reactions with compound sentences and mid-action clauses to reduce the run of short declaratives.
When the runner reports the arrest, merge the dialogue fragments with the explanatory beats using conjunctions or brief participial attachments.
In the border-ride stretch, add connective tissue between terrain detail and tactical thought—especially participial phrases that carry motion through the paragraph.
The 'hands marked up / frost burns' cluster needs recombination: join the inventory into fuller clauses rather than stacking clipped evidence lines.
At Cyndia's greeting and initial report, use compound delivery and embedded action beats so the briefing does not read as a sequence of detached statements.
Around the name confirmation, combine the confirmation beats with Sylvanas's inference in one longer sentence to interrupt the short-sentence chain.
In Jaina's confinement summary, convert the stacked report lines into compound or participial structures that preserve pace without flattening into telegram prose.
The satchel-analysis sequence needs joined sentences and clause layering; tie observation, inference, and response together instead of isolating each beat.
During the Cyndia warning exchange, replace the string of short replies with at least one compound sentence and one action-linked interruption beat.
In the holding-room approach, enrich the clipped approach beats with participial motion phrases and one or two compound clauses to restore connective texture.

textureFindings.priorityInstruction: Participial density is 3.8% against a 12.0% target — add ', Ving' connective phrases in every flagged zone and combine adjacent short sentences before addressing smaller texture gaps.
